productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Casual Black Floater
description: Look trendy and stay comfortable in these black floaters from red tape. This black pair can be teamed with jeans and tees for a cool casual look. Upper Wide leather uppers covering feet from forefoot to ankle for durability and protection Contoured panel overlays and stitch detailing for added reinforcement and style Lightly cushioned lining for better comfort Ankle strap with light cushioning and elasticated sides for easy insertion and removal of the feet Brand tab attached on the side Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Cushioned suede footbed for all-day comfort Footbed stitched to the midsole for enhanced durability Outsole Durable rubber outsole with leaf midrib pattern lugs for maximum grip and traction on various surfaces Curved midfoot ergonomic comfort Wash care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shineUse a suede brush to dust suede surfaceDo not store in direct sunlight
